title: Labs Kita, Okey Ka Lang?
creator: Jerry Lopez Sineneng
description: In this restored and remastered film, childhood best friends Ned (Marvin Agustin) and Bujoy's (Jolina Magdangal) friendship is threatened by Bujoy's growing feelings for him and the arrival of her beautiful balikbayan friend, Mary Ann (Vanessa del Bianco).

title: The Breakup Playlist
creator: Dan Villegas
description: A story about the relationship and eventual breakup of aspiring singer Trixie (Sarah Geronimo) and rocker Gino (Piolo Pascual), and how reuniting for a project will affect their lingering feelings for each other. Released in 2015 and directed by Dan Villegas.
